BOOSEapp Documentation
Table of Contents

Class AppPeek

Namespace
BOOSEapp
Assembly
BOOSEapp.dll

Represents the "peek" command that retrieves a value from an array at a specified index and assigns it to a variable.

public class AppPeek : Command, ICommand

object
Command
AppPeek

AppPeek()

Initializes a new instance of the AppPeek class.

public AppPeek()

Methods

CheckParameters(string[]) 

public override void CheckParameters(string[] parameterList)

Parameters

parameterList string[]

Compile()

Parses the peek command parameters, extracting the target varaible name, array name, and index expression. The expected syntax is "peek var = arrayName index", where "var" is the target variable to assign the value to, "arrayName", is the name of the array to peek from, and "index" is the expression for the index to peek at.

public override void Compile()

Exceptions

CommandException

Execute()

Executes the peek command by evaluating the index expression, reading the value from the specified array at that index, and storing the result in the target variable.

public override void Execute()

Exceptions

CommandException
